answer:
<Maple Hill in Sussex County, N.J. lies on the Appalachian Trail. The Appalachian Trail is a long-distance hiking trail that stretches from Georgia to Maine, passing through several states including New Jersey. In New Jersey, the trail passes through the Appalachian Mountains, which include parts of Sussex County. Therefore, Maple Hill, being in Sussex County, is part of the Appalachian Trail.>

<answer>Appalachian Trail</answer>
